tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS invocations
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent'
tiles.title: Total invocations

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_status_code = 2) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS error_rate_pct
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent'
tiles.title: Error rate

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(span_duration_ns / 1000000000.0), 2) AS avg_duration_s
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent'
tiles.title: Average agent run duration

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns / 1000000000.0, 0.95), 2) AS p95_duration_s
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent'
tiles.title: P95 agent run duration

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', "p_timestamp", '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.name", 'unknown') AS agent_name, COUNT(*) AS runs
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent'
GROUP BY time_bin, agent_name
ORDER BY time_bin ASC, agent_name ASC
tiles.title: Agents run over time

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', "p_timestamp", '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_status_code = 2) AS errors
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent'
GROUP BY time_bin
ORDER BY time_bin ASC
tiles.title: Errors

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', "p_timestamp", '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.50), 2) AS p50, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.75), 2) AS p75, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.90), 2) AS p90, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.95), 2) AS p95, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.99), 2) AS p99, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.999), 2) AS p999, ROUND(AVG(span_duration_ns), 2) AS avg
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name"='invoke_agent'
GROUP BY time_bin
ORDER BY time_bin ASC
tiles.title: Tool latency

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', "p_timestamp", '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", 'unknown') AS model, SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) + SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) AS tokens
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat' AND "gen_ai.request.model" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY time_bin, model
ORDER BY time_bin ASC, model ASC
tiles.title: Token consumption by Model

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', "p_timestamp", '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name") AS tool, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns / 1000000.0, 0.95), 2) AS p95_ms
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name") IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY time_bin, tool
ORDER BY time_bin ASC, tool ASC
tiles.title: Tool P95 Latency

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', "p_timestamp", '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name") AS tool, COUNT(*) AS calls
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name") IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY time_bin, tool
ORDER BY time_bin ASC, tool ASC
tiles.title: Tool Calls Over Time

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", 'unknown') AS model, COUNT(*) AS chat_calls
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat' AND "gen_ai.request.model" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY chat_calls DESC
tiles.title: Model Chat Calls

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name") AS tool, COUNT(*) AS calls
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name") IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY tool
ORDER BY calls DESC
LIMIT 15
tiles.title: Top Tools

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE(body_exit_status, 'unknown') AS exit_status, COUNT(*) AS invocations
FROM $log_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.event.name" = 'gen_ai.agent.finish'
GROUP BY exit_status
ORDER BY invocations DESC
tiles.title: Finish Status

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT "gen_ai.operation.name" AS operation, COUNT(*) AS spans, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.50), 2) AS p50, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.75), 2) AS p75, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.90), 2) AS p90, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.95), 2) AS p95, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.99), 2) AS p99, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.999), 2) AS p999, ROUND(AVG(span_duration_ns), 2) AS avg
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY operation
ORDER BY spans DESC
tiles.title: Overall agent latency
Slowest Invocations

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT p_timestamp, span_trace_id, COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name") AS tool, span_name, ROUND(span_duration_ns / 1000000.0, 2) AS duration_ms, span_status_code, "swe_agent.tool.exit_code" AS exit_code, COALESCE("error.message", span_status_message) AS error_message
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name") IS NOT NULL AND (span_status_code = 2 OR ("swe_agent.tool.exit_code" IS NOT NULL AND "swe_agent.tool.exit_code" != '0') OR "error.message" IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 25
tiles.title: Tool Failures
Recent Invocation Detail

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE body_submission_present = true) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS submission_rate_pct, COUNT(*) AS finished_invocations
FROM $log_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.event.name" = 'gen_ai.agent.finish'
GROUP BY time_bin
ORDER BY time_bin ASC
tiles.title: Submission Rate Over Time

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COALESCE(body_exit_status, 'unknown') AS exit_status, COUNT(*) AS invocations
FROM $log_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.event.name" = 'gen_ai.agent.finish'
GROUP BY time_bin, exit_status
ORDER BY time_bin ASC, exit_status ASC
tiles.title: Exit Status Over Time

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name") AS tool, COUNT(*) AS calls, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_status_code = 2 OR ("swe_agent.tool.exit_code" IS NOT NULL AND "swe_agent.tool.exit_code" != '0') OR "error.message" IS NOT NULL) AS failures, ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_status_code = 2 OR ("swe_agent.tool.exit_code" IS NOT NULL AND "swe_agent.tool.exit_code" != '0') OR "error.message" IS NOT NULL) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS failure_rate_pct
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name") IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY tool
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY failure_rate_pct DESC, calls DESC
LIMIT 15
tiles.title: Tool Failure Rate by Tool

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("swe_agent.problem.id", 'unknown') AS problem_id, COUNT(*) AS invocations, ROUND(AVG(span_duration_ns / 1000000000.0), 2) AS avg_duration_s, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns / 1000000000.0, 0.95), 2) AS p95_duration_s, ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "swe_agent.submission.present" = true) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS submission_rate_pct
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent'
GROUP BY problem_id
ORDER BY invocations DESC
LIMIT 20
tiles.title: Problem Hotspots

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("swe_agent.env.name", 'unknown') AS env_name, COALESCE("swe_agent.version", 'unknown') AS version, COUNT(*) AS invocations, ROUND(AVG(span_duration_ns / 1000000000.0), 2) AS avg_duration_s, ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_status_code = 2) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS error_rate_pct
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent'
GROUP BY env_name, version
ORDER BY invocations DESC
LIMIT 20
tiles.title: Environment / Version Breakdown

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.provider.name", 'unknown') AS provider, COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model, COUNT(*) AS calls, ROUND(AVG(span_duration_ns / 1000000.0), 2) AS avg_ms, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns / 1000000.0, 0.95), 2) AS p95_ms, ROUND(SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE) + CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)), 0) AS total_tokens
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat'
GROUP BY provider, model
ORDER BY calls DESC
LIMIT 20
tiles.title: Provider / Model Health
Total tokens per invocation
tiles.chartQuery:
WITH inv AS ( SELECT span_trace_id, date_bin('1 minute', MIN(p_timestamp), '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE) + CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) AS total_tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat' AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY span_trace_id
)
SELECT time_bin, ROUND(AVG(total_tokens), 2) AS avg_tokens_per_invocation, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(total_tokens, 0.90), 2) AS p90_tokens_per_invocation
FROM inv
GROUP BY time_bin
ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: Recent Trace Summary
Tool Usage Over Time
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name", span_name, 'unknown') AS tool, COUNT(*) AS calls
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'execute_tool'
GROUP BY time_bin, tool
ORDER BY time_bin ASC, tool ASC

tiles.title: Tool Latency Over Time
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name", span_name, 'unknown') AS tool, ROUND(AVG(span_duration_ns / 1000000000.0), 3) AS avg_latency_s
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'execute_tool' AND span_duration_ns IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY time_bin, tool
ORDER BY time_bin ASC, tool ASC

tiles.title: Tool Performance Summary
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.tool.name", "tool.name", span_name, 'unknown') AS tool, COUNT(*) AS calls, ROUND(AVG(span_duration_ns / 1000000000.0), 3) AS avg_latency_s, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns / 1000000000.0, 0.95), 3) AS p95_latency_s, ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE span_status_code != 2) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS success_rate_pct
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'execute_tool'
GROUP BY tool
ORDER BY calls DESC
LIMIT 30

tiles.title: Cost Over Time
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY time_bin
ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: Cost Rate of Change
tiles.chartQuery:
WITH hourly AS ( SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS cost_usd FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time_bin
)
SELECT time_bin, ROUND(cost_usd, 6) AS cost_usd, ROUND(cost_usd - LAG(cost_usd) OVER (ORDER BY time_bin), 6) AS cost_change_usd, ROUND((cost_usd - LAG(cost_usd) OVER (ORDER BY time_bin)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(LAG(cost_usd) OVER (ORDER BY time_bin), 0), 2) AS cost_change_pct
FROM hourly
ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: Cumulative Cost
tiles.chartQuery:
WITH hourly AS ( SELECT date_bin('1 min', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS cost_usd FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time_bin
)
SELECT time_bin, ROUND(SUM(cost_usd) OVER (ORDER BY time_bin ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 6) AS cumulative_cost_usd
FROM hourly
ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: Cost per Token Over Time
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) / NULLIF(SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE) + CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)), 0), 10) AS cost_per_token_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY time_bin
ORDER BY time_bin ASC

tiles.title: Cost by Model
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Cost by Provider and Model
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.provider.name", 'inferred') AS provider, COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model, COUNT(*) AS events, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd, ROUND(AVG(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS avg_event_cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY provider, model
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30

tiles.title: Total cost over time
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY time_bin, model
ORDER BY time_bin ASC, model ASC

tiles.title: Highest Cost Invocations
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT span_trace_id, MIN(p_timestamp) AS start_time, COALESCE(MAX("gen_ai.provider.name"), 'inferred') AS provider, COALESCE(MAX("gen_ai.request.model"), MAX("gen_ai.response.model"), 'unknown') AS model, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd, SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) AS input_tokens, SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) AS output_tokens
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY span_trace_id
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 50

tiles.title: Invocation Cost Distribution
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT CASE WHEN invocation_cost_usd < 0.001 THEN '< $0.001' WHEN invocation_cost_usd < 0.01 THEN '$0.001 - $0.01' WHEN invocation_cost_usd < 0.05 THEN '$0.01 - $0.05' WHEN invocation_cost_usd < 0.10 THEN '$0.05 - $0.10' ELSE '>= $0.10' END AS cost_bucket, COUNT(*) AS invocations
FROM ( SELECT span_trace_id, SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS invocation_cost_usd FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY span_trace_id
) t
WHERE invocation_cost_usd IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bucket
ORDER BY cost_bucket ASC

tiles.title: Cost vs Tokens by Invocation
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT span_trace_id, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd, SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE) + CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) AS total_tokens
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY span_trace_id
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 100

tiles.title: Cost by User
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("username", 'unknown') AS username, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd, COUNT(DISTINCT span_trace_id) AS invocations
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY username
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Cost by Agent Name
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.name", 'unknown') AS agent_name, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd, COUNT(DISTINCT span_trace_id) AS invocations
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY agent_name
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Cost by User and Model
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("username", 'unknown') AS username, COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY username, model
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30

tiles.title: Cost by Agent and Model
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.name", 'unknown') AS agent_name, COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY agent_name, model
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 30

tiles.title: Total tool calls
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS tool_calls
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'execute_tool'

tiles.title: Total cost
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS total_cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp) IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Total input tokens
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE) + CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) AS total_tokens
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat' AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: Average cost per agent run
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(invocation_cost_usd), 6) AS avg_invocation_cost_usd
FROM ( SELECT span_trace_id, SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS invocation_cost_usd FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY span_trace_id
) t
WHERE invocation_cost_usd IS NOT NULL

tiles.title: P95 Invocation Latency by Agent
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.name", 'unknown') AS agent_name, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.95), 2) AS p95_latency_s, COUNT(*) AS invocations
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'invoke_agent' AND span_duration_ns IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY agent_name
LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Invocation Latency by Username
tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("username", 'unknown') AS username, ROUND(MAX(span_duration_ns), 2) AS max_latency_s, COUNT(DISTINCT span_trace_id) AS invocations
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE span_duration_ns IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY username
LIMIT 20

tiles.title: P95 Input/Output Tokens Over Time
tiles.chartQuery:
WITH token_bins AS ( SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), 0.95), 2) AS p95_input_tokens, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), 0.95), 2) AS p95_output_tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat' AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time_bin
)
SELECT time_bin, 'input' AS token_type, p95_input_tokens AS tokens
FROM token_bins
UNION ALL
SELECT time_bin, 'output' AS token_type, p95_output_tokens AS tokens
FROM token_bins
ORDER BY time_bin ASC, token_type ASC

tiles.title: P95 Chat Cost Over Time
tiles.chartQuery:
WITH chat_cost AS ( SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp) AS cost_usd FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat' AND COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT time_bin, ROUND(approx_percentile_cont(cost_usd, 0.95), 6) AS p95_chat_cost_usd
FROM chat_cost
WHERE cost_usd IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY time_bin
ORDER BY time_bin ASC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE("username", "user.name", 'unknown')) AS active_users FROM $trace_dataset WHERE COALESCE("username", "user.name", 'unknown') != 'unknown'
tiles.title: Active Users

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens.cached" AS DOUBLE), 0)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens.cached" AS DOUBLE), 0)),0),2) AS cache_hit_rate_pct FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
tiles.title: Cache Hit Rate

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE)),2) AS avg_input_tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat' AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
tiles.title: Avg Input Tokens / LLM Call

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)),2) AS avg_output_tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat' AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
tiles.title: Avg Output Tokens / LLM Call

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS runaway_runs FROM (SELECT span_trace_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat') AS chat_calls, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'execute_tool') AS tool_calls FROM $trace_dataset GROUP BY span_trace_id HAVING chat_calls >= 20 OR tool_calls >= 10) t
tiles.title: High Retry Loop Runs

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS budget_breaches FROM (SELECT COALESCE("workspace.name", 'unknown') AS workspace, SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) AS cost_usd, MAX(CAST("swe_agent.cost_limit.usd" AS DOUBLE)) AS budget_usd FROM $trace_dataset WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace HAVING cost_usd > budget_usd) t
tiles.title: Budget Breaches

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd FROM $trace_dataset WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time_bin ORDER BY time_bin ASC
tiles.title: Cost Usage / Minute

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, SUM(COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)) AS tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time_bin ORDER BY time_bin ASC
tiles.title: Token Usage / Minute

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, CASE WHEN "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat' THEN 'chat' ELSE 'workflow' END AS type, SUM(COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)) AS tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time_bin, type ORDER BY time_bin ASC
tiles.title: Tokens by Type

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin('1 minute', p_timestamp, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time_bin, COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model, SUM(COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)) AS tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY time_bin, model ORDER BY time_bin ASC
tiles.title: Tokens by Model

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT span_trace_id, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd FROM $trace_dataset WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY span_trace_id ORDER BY cost_usd DESC LIMIT 10
tiles.title: Cost per Agent Run

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT COALESCE("username", 'unknown') AS username, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model") IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY username
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC
LIMIT 10
tiles.title: Cost per User

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("team.name", "group.name", 'unknown') AS team, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd FROM $trace_dataset WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY team ORDER BY cost_usd DESC LIMIT 10
tiles.title: Cost per Team

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd FROM $trace_dataset WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') != 'unknown' AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model ORDER BY cost_usd DESC LIMIT 10
tiles.title: Cost per Model

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.component", "agent.component", "event_agent.component", "event_gen_ai.agent.component", 'unknown') IN ('planner','executor','judges','evals','judge','eval','tool') THEN COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.component", "agent.component", "event_agent.component", "event_gen_ai.agent.component", 'unknown') ELSE 'tool overhead' END AS component, SUM(COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)) AS tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY component ORDER BY tokens DESC
tiles.title: Token Component Share

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.component", "agent.component", "event_agent.component", "event_gen_ai.agent.component", 'unknown') IN ('planner','executor','judges','evals','judge','eval','tool') THEN COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.component", "agent.component", "event_agent.component", "event_gen_ai.agent.component", 'unknown') ELSE 'tool overhead' END AS component, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd FROM $trace_dataset WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY component ORDER BY cost_usd DESC
tiles.title: Component Cost Split

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.component", "agent.component", "event_agent.component", "event_gen_ai.agent.component", 'unknown') = 'executor' THEN COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0) ELSE 0 END) AS executor_tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
tiles.title: Executor Tokens

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.component", "agent.component", "event_agent.component", "event_gen_ai.agent.component", 'unknown') = 'planner' THEN COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0) ELSE 0 END) AS planner_tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
tiles.title: Planner Tokens

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.component", "agent.component", "event_agent.component", "event_gen_ai.agent.component", 'unknown') IN ('judge','judges','eval','evals') THEN COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0) ELSE 0 END) AS judges_tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
tiles.title: Judges/Evals Tokens

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.component", "agent.component", "event_agent.component", "event_gen_ai.agent.component", 'unknown') IN ('tool','tool overhead') OR "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'execute_tool' THEN COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0) ELSE 0 END) AS tool_overhead_tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
tiles.title: Tool Overhead Tokens

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT SUM(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE)) AS output_tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL
tiles.title: Output Tokens

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("workspace.name", 'unknown') AS workspace, COUNT(DISTINCT span_trace_id) AS runs, COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE("username", "user.name", 'unknown')) AS users, SUM(COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)+COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE),0)) AS tokens, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd FROM $trace_dataset WHERE COALESCE("workspace.name", 'unknown') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace ORDER BY cost_usd DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20
tiles.title: Workspace Rollups

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY p_timestamp ASC, span_start_time_unix_nano ASC) AS query_number, COALESCE("username", "user.name", 'unknown') AS username, COALESCE("workspace.name", 'unknown') AS workspace, COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model, ROUND(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp), 6) AS cost_usd, CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE) AS input_tokens, CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE) AS output_tokens, COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens.cached" AS DOUBLE), 0) AS cached_tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat' AND COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') != 'unknown' AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY query_number ASC LIMIT 50
tiles.title: Cost per Query

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, span_trace_id, COALESCE("username", "user.name", 'unknown') AS username, COALESCE("workspace.name", 'unknown') AS workspace, COALESCE("team.name", "group.name", 'unknown') AS team, COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') AS model, COALESCE("gen_ai.agent.component", "agent.component", "event_agent.component", "event_gen_ai.agent.component", 'unknown') AS component, CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE) AS input_tokens, CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE) AS output_tokens, COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens.cached" AS DOUBLE), 0) AS cached_tokens FROM $trace_dataset WHERE "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
tiles.title: Token Explorer

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT span_trace_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat') AS chat_calls, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'execute_tool') AS tool_calls, COUNT(*) AS spans, ROUND((MAX(span_end_time_unix_nano_epoch)-MIN(span_start_time_unix_nano_epoch))/1000000000.0,2) AS duration_s FROM $trace_dataset GROUP BY span_trace_id HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'chat') >= 20 OR COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "gen_ai.operation.name" = 'execute_tool') >= 10 ORDER BY chat_calls DESC LIMIT 20
tiles.title: High Retry Loop Details

tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("workspace.name", 'unknown') AS workspace, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)), 6) AS cost_usd, MAX(CAST("swe_agent.cost_limit.usd" AS DOUBLE)) AS budget_usd, ROUND(SUM(agent_cost("gen_ai.provider.name", COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model"), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" AS DOUBLE), p_timestamp)) * 100.0 / NULLIF(MAX(CAST("swe_agent.cost_limit.usd" AS DOUBLE)),0),2) AS burn_pct FROM $trace_dataset WHERE COALESCE("gen_ai.request.model", "gen_ai.response.model", 'unknown') IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL AND "gen_ai.usage.output_tokens" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY workspace ORDER BY burn_pct DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 20
tiles.title: Budget Burn Alerts

tiles.chartQuery:
SELECT SUM(COALESCE(CAST("gen_ai.usage.cached_tokens" AS DOUBLE), CAST("gen_ai.usage.input_tokens.cached" AS DOUBLE), 0)) AS cached_tokens
FROM $trace_dataset
WHERE "gen_ai.usage.input_tokens" IS NOT NULL
tiles.title: Cached Tokens
